title: Emissive Cape Portals
description: Makes the portals on the movie capes glow like they should
body: # Info This resourcepack makes all of the minecraft movie cape portals glow in the dark. Both the front and back portals glow. This makes them look awesome at night or in a dark cave. Warning: This resourcepack uses core shaders to make it emissive / glow. Due to this, it may not work with optifine and iris shaders. It does however work in vanilla & with sodium. # Screenshots ### Home cape ![Glowing blue portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0psvV8X/images/3ff20dc327f19e7f0ef9dc781adeb29ee77ab9d1.png) ### Menace cape ![Glowing nether portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0psvV8X/images/c16ea5f8caa50e4e7d3bd735374fbc5b21d4e3a9.png) ### Yearn cape A bit hard to tell but its there. ![Barely glowing yearn cape portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0psvV8X/images/33247693c527599bbdd4aab9a36fc4bb1a93571b.png) ![Yearn cape bottom portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0psvV8X/images/e9684d541fe15ad63bb7e6e251116d26bd793f1e.png) # Other ### Want to use this with my other packs? The above pack combines all of the following:
